root_sections.title: Executive Summary
root_sections.summary: The Executive Summary presents a comprehensive list of Ethiopian commercial banks and details the production of a 150‑page Annual Report by the Commercial Bank of Ethiopia, completed at a cost of 20,000 won. It also references the “Digital Moving Forward” e‑book, which provides a three‑image, 3‑D digital‑banking overview titled “Global Vision” with an integrated product catalog and includes a serif‑font job‑description document that outlines prioritized candidate skills.
